user.title: Connect Emby server
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to your local Emby server. The API key is stored in Home Assistant and is redacted from diagnostics.

data_description.name: Integration display name, recommended: EMBi
data_description.host: Local IP address or hostname without http:// or https://
data_description.ssl: Enable only when the local Emby endpoint uses HTTPS
data_description.api_key: Dedicated Emby API key for EMBi

reconfigure.title: Edit connection
reconfigure.description: Change server address, port, HTTPS or API key. EMBi reloads after saving.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Emby server.

abort.already_configured: This Emby server is already configured.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: The new connection belongs to another Emby server.

init.title: Manage EMBi
init.description: Filter devices, clean up Home Assistant registry entries, or remove historical devices directly from the local Emby server.

clients.title: Manage Emby devices
clients.description: Choose which clients are created as media players. Ignore rules always take precedence. Selection uses the stable combination of Emby device ID and app.

data_description.allowed_device_ids: Used only in Selected devices mode.
data_description.ignored_device_ids: These devices are never created, regardless of mode.

ha_cleanup.title: Clean up Home Assistant entries
ha_cleanup.description: Removes explicitly selected Emby entities from the entity registry. Ensure they are ignored or no longer created by legacy YAML first, otherwise they will return.

data.confirm_cleanup: I confirm removal from Home Assistant

server_cleanup.title: Delete devices from the Emby server
server_cleanup.description: Removes selected historical devices directly from the local Emby server device list. A client can register again when used later.

data.add_deleted_to_ignored: Also ignore deleted devices in Home Assistant
data.confirm_delete: I confirm permanent deletion from the Emby server

about.title: About Emby Integration - EMBi
about.description:
EMBi extends the official Home Assistant Emby integration with UI configuration, device filters, controlled registry cleanup, and explicitly confirmed cleanup of the local Emby server.

Version 0.2.0 · Project/idea: Gerry (Seger) · Based on Home Assistant Emby and pyemby.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Emby server.
error.delete_failed: At least one device could not be deleted from the Emby server.
